channel.title: GitHub Swift Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-composable-architecture
item.description: A library for building applications in a consistent and understandable way, with composition, testing, and ergonomics in mind.

item.title: onevcat/Kingfisher
item.description: A lightweight, pure-Swift library for downloading and caching images from the web.

item.title: seemoo-lab/openhaystack
item.description: Build your own 'AirTags' 🏷 today! Framework for tracking personal Bluetooth devices via Apple's massive Find My network.

item.title: stripe/stripe-ios
item.description: Stripe iOS SDK

item.title: ninxsoft/Mist
item.description: A Mac utility that automatically downloads macOS Firmwares / Installers.

item.title: PlayCover/PlayCover
item.description: Community fork of PlayCover

item.title: hmlongco/Factory
item.description: A new approach to Container-Based Dependency Injection for Swift and SwiftUI.

item.title: nikitabobko/AeroSpace
item.description: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS

item.title: apple/swift-nio
item.description: Event-driven network application framework for high performance protocol servers & clients, non-blocking.

item.title: apple/swift-collections
item.description: Commonly used data structures for Swift

item.title: mozilla-mobile/firefox-ios
item.description: Firefox for iOS

item.title: facebook/facebook-ios-sdk
item.description: Used to integrate the Facebook Platform with your iOS & tvOS apps.

item.title: apollographql/apollo-ios
item.description: 📱  A strongly-typed, caching GraphQL client for iOS, written in Swift.

item.title: swiftlang/swift-syntax
item.description: A set of Swift libraries for parsing, inspecting, generating, and transforming Swift source code.

item.title: apple/swift-async-algorithms
item.description: Async Algorithms for Swift

item.title: apple/swift-protobuf
item.description: Plugin and runtime library for using protobuf with Swift

item.title: RevenueCat/purchases-ios
item.description: In-app purchases and subscriptions made easy. Support for iOS, watchOS, tvOS, macOS, and visionOS.

item.title: grpc/grpc-swift
item.description: The Swift language implementation of gRPC.

item.title: Alamofire/Alamofire
item.description: Elegant HTTP Networking in Swift

item.title: Stengo/DeskPad
item.description: A virtual monitor for screen sharing

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: ChartsOrg/Charts
item.description: Beautiful charts for iOS/tvOS/OSX! The Apple side of the crossplatform MPAndroidChart.

item.title: SDWebImage/SDWebImageSwiftUI
item.description: SwiftUI Image loading and Animation framework powered by SDWebImage

item.title: SwiftGen/SwiftGen
item.description: The Swift code generator for your assets, storyboards, Localizable.strings, … — Get rid of all String-based APIs!
